decision.rationale: Full audit complete. Issues cataloged, container gaps identified, conflicts resolved.

outputs.description: Full audit: syntax issues, container gaps, script discoverability

key_findings: 0 of 9 rules in Morales pipeline have container: directives
4 new Dockerfiles needed: star, red_ml, fastx, morales_downstream
5 existing Dockerfiles reusable: picard, reditools, sprint, wgs (bcftools+samtools), jacusa2
Downstream scripts are relative paths to empty git submodule
config.yaml tools: section uses ~/bin/ paths that break in containers
No log: or resources: directives in any rule
shell: pipe in bcftools rule lacks set -euo pipefail
next_stage_context: The architect needs to produce tasks for: (1) add container_for() helper + containers: block to Snakefile/config, (2) add container:/log:/resources: to each rule, (3) update shell commands for containerized tools, (4) fix downstream script paths, (5) create 4 new Dockerfiles. The editing_wgs Snakefile is the canonical pattern to follow.
